title: Intraday decision-time
question: How early in the day can you call the close — and can you trade it?
finding: Describe, don't trade. By 11:30 ET the morning move calls the close ~80% of the time, but that hit-rate is a mechanical-overlap artifact; the tradable rest-of-day leg is a 50.4% coin flip (+3.4 bp gross, CI on zero, sub-cost, only 2022 positive).
